projectDescription: On-device, real-time multimodal AI that enables natural voice and vision conversations running entirely on your local machine, powered by Gemma 4 E2B and Kokoro TTS.
keyFeatures: On-device inference — no cloud, no API keys, fully private
Real-time multimodal: voice + vision in one conversation
Voice Activity Detection (VAD) for hands-free, push-to-talk-free interaction
Barge-in support — interrupt the AI mid-sentence by speaking
Sentence-level TTS streaming — audio starts before full response is generated
Cross-platform: Apple Silicon (MLX GPU) and Linux (ONNX/CPU)
Auto-downloads Gemma 4 E2B and Kokoro models on first run
~2.5-3.0s end-to-end latency on Apple M3 Pro
publicApiSurface: WebSocket /ws — send audio (base64 WAV) and image (base64 JPEG) frames, receive transcription + text + audio_chunk responses
GET / — serves the browser-based frontend UI
ENV MODEL_PATH — path to local gemma-4-E2B-it.litertlm model file
ENV KOKORO_ONNX — force ONNX TTS backend even on Apple Silicon
TTSBackend.generate(text, voice, speed) — unified TTS interface
tts.load() — auto-selects best TTS backend for current platform
uv run server.py — start the FastAPI server
